intro.title: About Me
intro.1: Hello! I am Yukun, a software developer currently working at Bank Julius Baer. I studied at National University of Singapore, majoring in Computer Science.
intro.2: I am trained in full stack development, however most of my working experience remains in frontend development. That said, I am quick to pick things up, whether it's something new or something I haven't worked with for a while.
intro.3: I am proficient in React, Redux, Typescript, Jest and MaterialUI elements, and also have experience with backend technologies such as Node.js and Express. I am also fluent in both English and Chinese.
intro.4: In my free time, I enjoy designing and 3D printing different cosplay props, organisers, tools and trinkets. I also rock climb occasionally and play some video games. In fact, playing Minecraft is why I learnt how to develop applications in Java, and very likely why I do what I do today!

project.title: What is This?
project.1: This site is a portfolio of my abilities, a more aesthetic resume, and a challenge to myself bundled into a single page.
project.2: It will receive 1 new component implementation per week (when time permits) as a challenge to myself both in terms of design and implementation.
project.3: Enjoy what I do here? Contact me for job opportunities, or if you just think something on here is really cool! Otherwise, please enjoy browsing around :)
